Title: MiMo benchmark surfaced 3 engine-layer defects (401 MiMo / 400 DeepSeek / Kimi rate-limit)
Notes: 3 root causes fixed: (1) MiMo 401 = wrong endpoint default - operator's tp- key is SGP-provisioned, my ams default was wrong; now MIMO_REGION defaults to sgp with ams/cn as alternates; (2) DeepSeek 400 = unsolicited 'thinking: False' field in payload (auto-injected when model.endswith('-flash')); DeepSeek API does NOT accept that JSON field; removed auto-injection, default = thinking ON (operator preference), explicit no_thinking only changes temperature; (3) Kimi 2/5 60s 'internal' = server-side rate-limit under parallel benchmark load - same prompts succeed when re-run sequentially. Final benchmark coord/benchmarks/mimo_vs_kimi_deepseek_20260522T070902Z.json: deepseek-flash 5/5 @ 8.1s, mimo-pro 5/5 @ 12.4s, mimo-standard 5/5 @ 12.7s, kimi-k2.6 3/5 @ 27.0s

Title: Auto-pick MiMo Pro (text) vs Standard (multimodal) based on packet content
Notes: New detect_mimo_model(packet, extra) helper: explicit model arg wins; else regex multimodal-marker detection (![img]/<img|video|audio>/data:image/<.png|.jpg|.mp4 inline) routes to mimo-v2.5; default falls to mimo-v2.5-pro (text-only). MiMoConcrete.dispatch invokes detect when model is empty/auto/mimo/default. 9 new tests covering all detection branches + override + word-boundary edge cases.

Title: Planner false-positive injection-block on harness-internal specs (D-NEW-2)
Notes: Commit 3fde0a4; dispatch_packet gains trusted_source bool kwarg that bypasses scan_packet_for_injection; planner + adapters.from_description pass True; default stays False so unknown callers never accidentally bypass; HARNESS_ALLOW_UNSAFE_PACKETS=1 global escape remains; 3 new tests

Title: Add mimo to all closed Literal backends (D-NEW-5)
Notes: Commit 33115be; ActiveDispatch.backend + RoutingAction.backend + WavePlan.planner_engine all gained mimo; coord plan --engine mimo now passes validation

Title: Auto-replace malformed run_id with conformant autogen + warning (D-NEW-4)
Notes: Commit 33115be; planner.plan() validates run_id pattern ^\d{8}T\d{6}-[a-z0-9]{4}$ at entry; free-form labels auto-replaced with _new_run_id() output + WARNING log; 2 new tests

Title: Integrator squash strategy commits between workers to handle overlapping commits (D7)
Notes: Commit b8f2f46; _merge_worker_branches now does add+commit --allow-empty after each --squash so the next worker's --squash starts from clean tree; final shape is one commit per worker (more readable than monolithic squash anyway); regression sentinel test reproduces exact two-worker dep-branched scenario; closes the last Round-1 battle-test defect
